approach: backfill a new behavioral node (mission/verify-scenarios) for the already-shipped verify-scenarios engine; additive-only, no existing frozen content touched
cold spec-judge over README + .feature against the shipped engine as ground truth, iterated to ALIGNED

why: Backfill spec+freeze for the shipped scenario->test bridge engine (SDD dogfooding its own tool; live impl at plugins/sdd/skills/verify-scenarios). New behavioral node mission/verify-scenarios (concept: delivery), README ## Use Cases + 29 boolean scenarios covering source-set parse/union, gherkin-cli scenario-key derivation (@id override, outline-as-one-key), junit adapter node/leaf/key extraction + XML unescape + literal-> non-truncation, PASS/FAIL/UNBOUND/EXTRA fold, the CLI surface (--report/--run/--format/usage), non-zero exit on UNBOUND/FAIL, and read-only + gherkin-cli-delegation boundaries. Cold sdd-spec-judge ALIGNED true after iter 2 (oracle/builder/architect all pass): iter-1 builder FAIL on uncovered command surface -> added the 5-scenario CLI stage; architect observation (present-tense impl-judge-consumption prose contradicting the frozen impl-judge 're-derivation is universal' scenario) resolved by softening both READMEs to 'designed to consume ... separate CR sdd-impl-judge-consume-bridge'. check-spec-state + check-suite green; new node additive so nothing re-opened; root stays approved (per-unit verdict). Self-asserted within auto-all leash, low blast.

Backfill: engine already shipped; deliver added one verification per frozen scenario (impl-producer added 14 tests + 3 pure-lift refactors of main into resolveSources/renderReport/exitCode, no behavior change). One non-blocking observation (no main() happy-path integration test) deferred to sdd-impl-judge-consume-bridge per README. Root stays approved (per-unit). Self-asserted within auto-all leash, low blast.
